zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Basset Chief Justice of England於大約1091年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親Ralph Basset17歲，母親Alice de Buci13歲。他於大約1122年與Matilda Ridel在英國英格蘭德比夏爾紐波勒德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在英國被列為justice。他去世於1147年之前在英國英格蘭貝德福爾瑟利，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Basset Chief Justice of England was born about 1091, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph Basset, was 17 and his mother, Alice de Buci, was 13. He married Matilda Ridel about 1122, in Newbold, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as justice in England. He died before 1147, in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Basset Chief Justice of England est né environ 1091, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Basset, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Alice de Buci, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Ridel environ 1122, à Newbold, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est justice à Angleterre. Il est décédé avant 1147, à Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Basset Chief Justice of England è nato il circa 1091 nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph Basset, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Buci, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Ridel circa 1122, nel Newbold, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come justice nel England. Morì prima del 1147, nel Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Basset Chief Justice of Englandが約1091年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ralph Bassetは17歳，母Alice de Buciは13歳であった。約1122年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアニューボルドでMatilda Ridelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。イギリスでの職業はjusticeと記録されている。彼は1147年以前にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアスウルレイグで死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Basset Chief Justice of England(이)가 대략 1091년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Basset(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Buci(은)는 13세였다. 그는 대략 1122년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 뉴볼드에서 Matilda Ridel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국에서 justice이었다. 그는 1147년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스를리에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Basset Chief Justice of England nasceu aproximadamente 1091, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Basset, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Buci, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Ridel aproximadamente 1122, em Newbold, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como justice em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu antes 1147, em Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Basset Chief Justice of England родился около 1091 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph Basset было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Buci, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Ridel около 1122 г. в местности нюболд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии justice в местности Англия. Он умер перед 1147 г. в местности турлиг, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Basset Chief Justice of England nació aproximadamente 1091, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph Basset, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Alice de Buci, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Matilda Ridel aproximadamente 1122, en Newbold, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era justice en Inglaterra. Murió antes de 1147, en Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
